name: Southwest Strata
recipeIngredient: 2 cans chopped green chiles (8 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a greased 9x13-inch baking pan with the tortillas.
2. Layer the chiles, turkey, cheese and corn half at a time in the prepared pan.
3. Beat the eggs, milk, Tabasco sauce, garlic powder and pepper together in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the layers.
5. Top with the cilantro.
6. Chill, covered, overnight.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes.
8. Cool and cut into squares to serve.
